sentences.target: Je prends l’auto pour aller au boulot.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁɑ̃ lo.to puʁ a.le o bu.lo/

translations.fr: Je prends l’auto pour aller au boulot.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁɑ̃ lo.to puʁ a.le o bu.lo/
translations.en: I take the car to go to work.
translations.de: Ich fahre mit dem Auto zur Arbeit.
translations.ru: Я езжу на работу на машине.
translations.pt: Vou para o trabalho de carro.
translations.vi: Tôi đi làm bằng ô tô.
translations.nl: Ik ga met de auto naar mijn werk.
translations.uk: Я їжджу на роботу на машині.
translations.hi: मैं कार से काम पर जाता हूँ.
translations.el: Πηγαίνω στη δουλειά με το αυτοκίνητο.
translations.id: Saya pergi ke kantor naik mobil.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking a direct object.
Noun meaning ‘car’, preceded by elided definite article l’ (le/la) attached to the token.
Preposition introducing a purpose clause or infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘pour’ expressing purpose.
Preposition ‘à’ contracted with the definite article ‘le’ (à + le → au); introduces a destination.
Informal noun meaning ‘work/job’; object of the preposition ‘au’.

translations.en: We're washing the car this morning.
translations.de: Wir waschen heute Morgen das Auto.
translations.pt: Vamos lavar o carro hoje de manhã.
translations.vi: Sáng nay chúng tôi rửa xe.
translations.hi: हम आज सुबह कार धो रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί πλένουμε το αυτοκίνητο.
translations.nb: Vi vasker bilen i dag tidlig.
translations.sv: Nu på morgonen tvättar vi bilen.
translations.da: Vi vasker bilen her til morgen.

tokens.explanation: Impersonal pronoun commonly used colloquially for ‘we’; 3rd person singular agreement.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive.
Noun ‘car’, with elided definite article l’ attached; direct object of ‘lave’.
Demonstrative determiner modifying a time noun.
Noun used as a temporal adjunct (‘this morning’).

sentences.target: Tu peux garer l’auto derrière la maison.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ga.ʁe lo.to dɛʁ.jɛʁ la mɛ.zɔ̃/

translations.fr: Tu peux garer l’auto derrière la maison.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ga.ʁe lo.to dɛʁ.jɛʁ la mɛ.zɔ̃/
translations.en: You can park the car behind the house.
translations.es: Puedes aparcar el coche detrás de la casa.
translations.de: Du kannst das Auto hinter dem Haus parken.
translations.it: Puoi parcheggiare la macchina dietro casa.
translations.ko: 집 뒤에 차를 주차할 수 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以把车停在房子后面。
translations.ru: Ты можешь припарковать машину за домом.
translations.pt: Você pode estacionar o carro atrás da casa.
translations.he: אתה יכול להחנות את האוטו מאחורי הבית.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể đỗ xe phía sau nhà.
translations.nl: Je kunt de auto achter het huis parkeren.
translations.uk: Ти можеш припаркувати машину за будинком.
translations.hu: Leparkolhatod az autót a ház mögött.
translations.hi: तुम घर के पीछे कार पार्क कर सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να παρκάρεις το αυτοκίνητο πίσω από το σπίτι.
translations.nb: Du kan parkere bilen bak huset.
translations.id: Anda bisa memarkir mobil di belakang rumah.
translations.sv: Du kan parkera bilen bakom huset.
translations.ro: Poți parca mașina în spatele casei.
translations.da: Du kan parkere bilen bag huset.
translations.ja: 家の裏に車を停められます。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular informal.
Finite verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; modal meaning expressing ability/permission.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of the modal ‘peux’.
Noun ‘car’, with attached elided definite article l’; direct object of ‘garer’.
Preposition indicating location.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun ‘maison’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘derrière’.

sentences.target: Ma sœur vend son auto demain.

translations.fr: Ma sœur vend son auto demain.
translations.en: My sister is selling her car tomorrow.
translations.es: Mi hermana vende su coche mañana.
translations.de: Meine Schwester verkauft morgen ihr Auto.
translations.it: Mia sorella vende la sua macchina domani.
translations.ru: Моя сестра завтра продает свою машину.
translations.pt: Minha irmã vai vender o carro dela amanhã.
translations.he: אחותי מוכרת את האוטו שלה מחר.
translations.vi: Chị gái tôi sẽ bán chiếc ô tô của mình vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: Mijn zus verkoopt morgen haar auto.
translations.uk: Моя сестра завтра продає свою машину.
translations.hu: A lánytestvérem holnap eladja az autóját.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन अपनी कार कल बेच रही है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra jutro sprzedaje swój samochód.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου πουλάει το αυτοκίνητό της αύριο.
translations.nb: Søsteren min selger bilen sin i morgen.
translations.id: Saudara perempuan saya akan menjual mobilnya besok.
translations.sv: Min syster säljer sin bil i morgon.
translations.ro: Sora mea își vinde mașina mâine.
translations.cs: Moje sestra zítra prodává své auto.
translations.da: Min søster sælger sin bil i morgen.
translations.ja: 私の姉は明日車を売ります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine singular, modifying ‘sœur’.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Possessive determiner; used before a vowel-initial noun (auto) regardless of the noun’s gender (here feminine).
Common noun; direct object of ‘vend’.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb to indicate time.
